claim: This source kit is not a backend workflow, authorization boundary, analytics system, complete onboarding product, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Native form composed with canonical Stepper and Button; domain controls are supplied by the consumer renderer.
semantics.rolePolicy: Validation and completion failures are persistent alerts; draft status and step announcements are emitted only when their enhancements are enabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through current-step fields, persistence controls, and navigation actions in document order.
Submits the current step through native form semantics.
Restores the initial draft and first step when mutable unless reset is cancelled by the consumer; read-only mode always disables and cancels reset without draft or step callbacks.

nonColor: Current, complete, optional, invalid, pending, saved, and failed states use text, native state, headings, and structure in addition to color.
responsive: Progress moves above the current step on narrow screens; logical properties preserve RTL and zoom without hiding actions.
consumerResponsibilities: Render labelled public controls, provide server-side validation, authorize persistence and completion, and avoid collecting unnecessary data.
Version and migrate persisted drafts, encrypt sensitive values, enforce retention, and recover from stale or incompatible snapshots.
Localize steps, validation, optionality, and announcements and complete mobile keyboard, screen-reader, speech, switch, touch, zoom, privacy, and legal review.
